text.content:
Injuries • Slashing • Bleeding Edge

Injury Card

Bleeding Edge

The cutting edge of the blade opens a torrent of crimson, as blood spills from the lacerations like a scarlet river flowing unchecked. Each slash becomes a reminder of the body's vulnerability, as life essence escapes in a crimson dance.

Treatment

Applying pressure to the bleeding edge and elevating the affected limb can help stem the flow of blood and promote clotting. Seeking medical evaluation for deeper lacerations or signs of excessive bleeding is crucial for proper treatment.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Slashing

  • odds: 20

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Bleeding Edge

  • imagetitle:

  • image: icons/skills/melee/strike-axe-blood-red.webp

  • description: The cutting edge of the blade opens a torrent of crimson, as blood spills from the lacerations like a scarlet river flowing unchecked. Each slash becomes a reminder of the body's vulnerability, as life essence escapes in a crimson dance.

  • treatment: Applying pressure to the bleeding edge and elevating the affected limb can help stem the flow of blood and promote clotting. Seeking medical evaluation for deeper lacerations or signs of excessive bleeding is crucial for proper treatment.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 5

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Slashing Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Slashing • Crimson Gash Of Carnage

Injury Card

Crimson Gash Of Carnage

A brutal slash carves through your flesh, leaving a deep, gaping wound that bleeds profusely. The pain is excruciating, and moving becomes a challenge as blood loss starts to take its toll.

Echoes Of The Blade
Treatment

Urgent magical healing or expert medical attention is necessary to prevent further complications or potential death.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Bleeding

Injuries • Slashing • Disembowelment Delight

Injury Card

Disembowelment Delight

Your innards had a brief day out of your body before you managed to stuff them back in. Now, your once trusty armor seems a bit snug.

Internal Struggle
Treatment

Seek a skilled healer to make sure everything is back where it should be.

  • Severity: Major

Injuries • Slashing • Gnash Wound

Injury Card

Gnash Wound

A deep gash from a sharp blade that just won't stop bleeding, causing a trail of drips wherever you go. Your clothes are now the latest in gruesome fashion.

Bloody Havoc
Treatment

Apply a clean bandage and hope for the best.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

Injuries • Slashing • Jagged Gash

Injury Card

Jagged Gash

The jagged gash left by a slashing strike mirrors the chaos of battle, a ragged tear in the fabric of flesh that oozes with pain and pulsates with every heartbeat. Each movement a reminder of the jagged nature of the wound.

Treatment

Careful cleaning and closure of the jagged gash are essential to prevent infection and promote proper healing. Monitoring for signs of inflammation or delayed healing can guide further treatment and prevent complications.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Slashing • Lacerating Wound

Injury Card

Lacerating Wound

The sharp bite of the blade leaves a lacerating wound, tearing through flesh and rending skin with a merciless ferocity. Each slash, a symphony of pain, as the jagged edge cuts deep and leaves a trail of crimson in its wake.

Treatment

Promptly cleaning and disinfecting the lacerating wound is crucial to prevent infection and promote healing. Proper wound care, bandaging, and monitoring for signs of complications are essential during the recovery process.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

  • Duration: 38

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Slashing • Paper Cut From Hell

Injury Card

Paper Cut From Hell

You yelp in surprise as you receive a minuscule cut, yet the pain that follows is disproportionate. It feels like a paper cut, but with the fury of a thousand devils.

Blade Of Banter
Treatment

Apply a healing salve and try not to get any more paper cuts, especially from vicious monsters.

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Slashing • Partially Severed Ligament

Injury Card

Partially Severed Ligament

An enemy's blade grazes you, leaving your ligament partially severed. The pain is sharp and intensifies with each movement you make, hindering your combat capabilities.

Waltz Of The Blade
Treatment

Seek immediate magical or expert medical attention to repair the ligament before the injury worsens.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Restrained

Injuries • Slashing • Rending Rift

Injury Card

Rending Rift

The rending rift carved by a slashing blow leaves behind a gaping chasm of agony, where raw flesh and exposed nerves scream in protest. Each breath a torment, as the wound throbs with a rhythm of its own.

Treatment

Stabilizing the rending rift with sterile dressings and avoiding further trauma to the area are crucial for promoting healing. Seeking medical evaluation for deep wounds or signs of infection can prevent complications and aid in recovery.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 62

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Slashing • Sashimi Slice

Injury Card

Sashimi Slice

A precise cut that leaves you feeling as thin and fragile as a piece of sashimi, making you more susceptible to further injuries.

Culinary Misadventure
Treatment

Tape yourself back together with magic or healing potions.

Injuries • Slashing • Severed Limb

Injury Card

Severed Limb

The brutal severing of a limb leaves a gaping void where once there was strength and mobility. The stark reality of the loss sends shockwaves through the body, as pain and disbelief collide in a cruel symphony of suffering.

Treatment

Immediate medical intervention is critical for addressing the severed limb, including controlling bleeding, stabilizing the patient, and ensuring proper wound management. Surgical measures and rehabilitation efforts are essential for the long-term well-being and functionality of the individual.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Prone

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Slashing

  • odds: 10

  • foldername: Injuries

  • treatment: Immediate medical intervention is critical for addressing the severed limb, including controlling bleeding, stabilizing the patient, and ensuring proper wound management. Surgical measures and rehabilitation efforts are essential for the long-term well-being and functionality of the individual.

Injuries • Slashing • Severed Strands

Injury Card

Severed Strands

In the aftermath of a slashing strike, severed strands of flesh hang like tattered remnants of a once-whole canvas. The blade's keen edge cleaves through sinew and muscle, leaving a landscape of destruction in its wake.

Treatment

Seeking immediate medical attention to address the severed strands is essential to prevent further damage and facilitate healing. Surgical intervention and meticulous wound care may be necessary to restore function and prevent complications.

Details

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 5 Hit Points

Injuries • Slashing • Slashed Eye

Injury Card

Slashed Eye

The vicious slash across the eye sends shards of pain through the delicate orb, leaving a trail of crimson and blurred vision in its wake. The world shifts and distorts, a reminder of the fragility of sight in the face of a brutal assault. The dice have decided your fate: [[1d2]] The roll of a 1 = left and a 2 = right.

Treatment

Immediate evaluation by an ophthalmologist is essential for addressing the slashed eye, including measures to control bleeding, assess vision impairment, and prevent infection. Surgical intervention and ongoing care are crucial for restoring vision and preventing long-term complications.

Details

  • Category: Slashing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 8 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Blind

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Slashing

  • odds: 20

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Slashed Eye

  • description: The vicious slash across the eye sends shards of pain through the delicate orb, leaving a trail of crimson and blurred vision in its wake. The world shifts and distorts, a reminder of the fragility of sight in the face of a brutal assault. The dice have decided your fate: [[1d2]] The roll of a 1 = left and a 2 = right.

  • treatment: Immediate evaluation by an ophthalmologist is essential for addressing the slashed eye, including measures to control bleeding, assess vision impairment, and prevent infection. Surgical intervention and ongoing care are crucial for restoring vision and preventing long-term complications.

Injuries • Slashing • Tickle Of The Blade

Injury Card

Tickle Of The Blade

You feel a light tickling sensation as if a mischievous imp is gently running a blade across your skin. The cut is shallow but surprisingly persistent, causing slight discomfort.

Whispers In The Wind
Treatment

Bandage the wound and rest for a short while to let it heal naturally.
